## What changed

Describe the resources, pages, data, or templates you changed.

## Resource type

Choose the closest type:

- Tool
- Payload list
- Cheat sheet
- Writeup
- GitBook / handbook
- Video / training
- Lab / practice
- Checklist
- Command snippet
- Dork
- Reference

## Topic

Examples: recon, XSS, SSRF, SQL injection, API, OAuth, GraphQL, file upload, cloud, Burp Suite, WAF bypass.

## Placement

List the folder or page where the resource belongs.

## Quality check

- [ ] The resource is relevant to web application hacking.
- [ ] The link works or the status is clearly noted.
- [ ] The resource is placed in the right topic folder.
- [ ] The change focuses on public vault content, data, templates, or documentation.
- [ ] Internal Markdown links were checked.
